packageRules.description: Freeze the AGP 8.x minimum-supported fixture: every pin here is deliberate and must be bumped by hand.

compose-bom-compat: freeze on the 2026.x line. The original intent was a 1.9.x floor (2025.11.01) so renderer-android could emit Compose 1.9.x bytecode, but @AnimatedPreview's reflective AnimationInspector grew a hard dependency on >= 1.10 — see comment in libs.versions.toml. Bumps must be manual.
VS Code API floor declarations — bumping these drops support for older editors, must be a manual decision.
